Face Age Verification

HyOS uses your camera to estimate your age.
Everything runs locally — no images are saved or uploaded.

🔒  Processed entirely on your device — never sent anywhere.
🔞  Apps rated 18+ require you to be 18 or older.
🤖  Hyley AI is available for users aged 13 and above.

Game Mode

Enable Game Mode
Game Mode optimizes performance by:
  • Prioritizing game processes
  • Disabling background apps
  • Reducing system notifications
  • Maximizing GPU allocation

Privacy & Security

Data Collection

Send usage data
Share anonymous usage statistics
Crash reports
Automatically send error logs
Personalized recommendations
Tailor app suggestions to your usage
Track app usage
Record how often each app is used

Global App Permissions

Global defaults. Apps still request permission individually on first launch.
📍 Location access
Allow apps to request your location
📷 Camera access
Allow apps to use your camera
🎤 Microphone access
Allow apps to use your microphone
📁 HyFiles access
Allow apps to read and write files
🔔 Notifications JSON
Allow apps to push notifications via JSON config
🖼️ Set wallpaper JSON
Allow apps to change your wallpaper via JSON config
📋 Clipboard access
Allow apps to read and write clipboard
🔒 Safe srcdoc SAFE
Sandboxed srcdoc without same-origin (no Firebase/database access)
⚠️ Full srcdoc ADVANCED
Srcdoc with same-origin (restricted Firebase access, can't delete website)

Per-App Permissions

Security

Require password for installs
Prompt before installing any app
Auto-lock after idle
Lock session after inactivity
Lock after (minutes)
Block unknown apps
Prevent apps not from the Store from running

Firebase Configuration

To use your own Firebase:
1. Create a Firebase project
2. Enable Firestore Database
3. Replace firebaseConfig in code
4. Create collections: global_apps, installed

HyOS uses face recognition to estimate your age locally. No images are stored or sent anywhere.
